title: InventorySee
description: The plugin allows admins to safely view and edit players' inventories (/invsee) and view ender chests (/ecsee).
body:
**[⚠️]NOTE!** If u have aby issue with the plugin please report to in our discord!

InvSee is an advanced Bukkit/Spigot plugin for Minecraft servers that allows administrators to safely view and edit other players' inventories using the /invsee <player_name> command. It opens a custom 45-slot inventory window replicating the target's equipment (including armor and off-hand items), with protected slots containing barriers and the player's head that cannot be removed or manipulated—even in case of glitches, the plugin automatically restores them. Any changes made by the admin (moving, adding, or removing items) are synchronized in real-time to the target's actual inventory. Additionally, the /ecsee <player_name> command provides direct view access to a player's ender chest without editing capabilities. The plugin requires permissions invsee.use and ecsee.use, handles click, drag, close, and quit events, ensuring full security and no exploits—perfect for moderation on PvP or survival servers!
